beats.speaker: Presenter
beats.text: Hello, I'm Marilyn. I'm going to show you how to make a movie with MulmoCast
beats.imagePrompt: She is standing alone in a bright movie studio wearing a red sexy dress, smiling and waving at the camera.

beats.speaker: Presenter
beats.text: Here I am, walking through the streets of New York in the 1950s.
beats.imagePrompt: She is walking on a busy New York City street in the 1950s, wearing a stylish period outfit, surrounded by vintage cars and classic storefronts.
beats.moviePrompt: She walks gracefully down a bustling 1950s New York City sidewalk, her dress flowing as she moves, vintage yellow taxis and pedestrians passing by in the background.

beats.speaker: Presenter
beats.text: And now, let me show you my tap dance!
beats.moviePrompt: She performs an energetic tap dance on a classic wooden stage, her feet rhythmically tapping, spotlight shining down on her, with a big smile on her face.

beats.speaker: Presenter
beats.text: Watch me take on three bad guys with my karate moves!
beats.moviePrompt: She performs powerful karate moves, fighting against one menacing bad guys in a dramatic showdown, delivering swift kicks and punches, her movements fast and precise, with dynamic action cinematography. No voice. No bgm. Just the sound effect.
